hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if f.endswith('SKILL.md'):
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'SKILL.md written — score loop: python tools/validate_claude_setup.py <setup-dir> --score. Iterate description first, fill body after.'}}))
"
